body: Oceananigans v0.107 changes how the grid is stored in the JLDWriter object - see [this comment](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/5486#issue-4237226068) for details. This PR removes the `grid` kwarg to `JLD2Writer` to avoid a duplicate grid warning. The code should remain compatible with older versions of Oceananigans with this change
title: (0.9.7) update for Oceananigans v0.107
